name: IsDown
description: Cloud service outage monitoring and aggregation across 3,500+ vendor status pages with Slack/email alerts.

seo.title: IsDown — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: IsDown: Cloud service outage monitoring and aggregation across 3,500+ vendor status pages with Slack/email alerts.

when_to_use: Aggregate 3,500+ vendor status pages into one feed
Slack/email alerts when dependent services go down
Correlation of your incidents with upstream outages
SLA impact tracking during third-party downtime events

pros: Aggregates 3,500+ vendor status pages in one feed
Slack, Teams, email and webhook alerts
Cheaper than rolling your own status monitoring
cons: Relies on vendors posting accurate status pages
Latency between real outage and status update
Alert noise on shared-dependency cascade events
review.verdict: Smart time-saver for dependency monitoring, but only as good as vendors updating their pages honestly.
review.best_for: Ops teams tracking dozens of SaaS dependencies without polling each status page manually.
review.not_for: Teams needing real-time outage detection ahead of vendor announcements.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
